general.title: Help Center
general.description: Press F1 or ? to view help for the current page at any time.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

exportButton.title: Export Data
exportButton.description: Export current dashboard data to CSV or Excel format.

exportButton.title: Export Tasks

edit.title: Edit Task

annotate.title: Annotation View
annotate.description: Annotate data with support for multiple annotation types.

admin.title: System Admin

console.title: Admin Console
console.description: System status overview with key metrics and alerts.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage user accounts, role assignments, and access permissions.

system.title: System Configuration
system.description: Configure system-level parameters, email services, and global settings.

llm-config.description: Configure LLM API keys, model selection, and parameter tuning.

text-to-sql.title: Text-to-SQL Configuration
text-to-sql.description: Configure natural language to SQL models and database connections.

permissions.title: Permission Configuration
permissions.description: Manage role permission matrices and feature access control.

quota.title: Quota Management
quota.description: Set and monitor tenant resource quotas and usage limits.

billing-management.title: Billing Management
billing-management.description: Manage billing rules, pricing plans, and invoice generation.

config-dashboard.title: Configuration Overview
config-dashboard.description: View status and health of all system configurations.

config-llm.title: LLM Config Management
config-llm.description: Manage multiple LLM provider configurations and switching strategies.

config-db.title: Database Configuration
config-db.description: Manage database connections, connection pools, and performance parameters.

sql-builder.title: SQL Builder
sql-builder.description: Visually build and test SQL queries.

config-history.title: Configuration History
config-history.description: View configuration change logs and rollback operations.

third-party.title: Third-Party Integration
third-party.description: Configure external service integrations like storage and message queues.

ai-integration.title: AI Integration
ai-integration.description: Configure AI model access, inference services, and model management.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update personal info, language preferences, and notifications.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: View usage statistics, billing details, and cost reports.

security.title: Security Center
security.description: Manage audit logs, permissions, SSO, and session security.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.description: View system operation logs, filter by time, user, and action type.

permissions.title: Permission Management
permissions.description: Configure feature permissions and data access control policies.

dashboard.title: Security Overview
dashboard.description: View security event statistics, risk assessments, and compliance status.

rbac.title: Role Management (RBAC)

sso.title: Single Sign-On (SSO)

sessions.title: Session Management
sessions.description: View active sessions, manage session timeouts and forced logout policies.

data-permissions.description: Configure data-level access control and field masking rules.

quality.title: Quality Management
quality.description: Configure quality rules, view reports, and improvement tasks.

rules.description: Define and manage data quality check rules and thresholds.

reports.title: Quality Reports
reports.description: View quality check results, trend analysis, and improvement suggestions.

improvement.title: Improvement Tasks
improvement.description: Manage creation, assignment, and tracking of quality improvement tasks.

augmentation.title: Data Augmentation
augmentation.description: Manage sample data, augmentation strategies, and AI processing.

samples.title: Sample Management

config.title: Augmentation Configuration
config.description: Configure data augmentation strategies, parameters, and automation rules.

sources.title: Data Source Management

history.title: Sync History

export.title: Data Export

datalake.description: Manage data lake storage, source connections, and schema browsing.
